lessons.title: The Beatitudes
objectives: Explore the blessings Jesus shared in the Sermon on the Mount.
Discuss practical ways to live each beatitude.
lessons.contentHtml: Work through each beatitude, inviting students to connect the teaching to modern life. Encourage journaling and group reflection.
lessons.teacherNotes: Use breakout groups to let learners wrestle with each blessing. Summarise insights at the end.

lessons.title: Faith in Action
objectives: Consider how faith shapes daily decisions.
Challenge students to plan a service project.
lessons.contentHtml: Discuss the relationship between faith and works. Use case studies to prompt debate and commitment.
lessons.teacherNotes: Invite testimonies from youth leaders about living faith. Assign planning roles for a class outreach activity.

quizzes.prompt: James teaches that faith without works is dead.
